name_en: M13994 Blue Denim Cherry Blossom 🍒. The Pochette Accessoires handbag joins the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series. Monogram denim canvas highlights the bright embroidery of the cherry pattern, interpreting the artist's playful aesthetic. Leather trim and shiny metal hardware enrich the details. Dimensions: 22*4*13cm. (Excludes doll)
